name: Circus Elephant
short_description: Circus Elephant is a 3d platformer, where you play as an elephant in a circus. You need to control a ball that the elephant rides
detailed_description: Circus Elephant is a 3d platformer, where you play as an elephant in a circus. You need to control a ball that the elephant rides. The circus has a lot of obstacles that the elephant needs to pass, this elephant was captured from a forest by humans, and your main objective is to pass all obstacles to reach the end of each level, this game is a physics-based platformer momentum of the ball is crucial here. You can use a keyboard or controller to control the ball which moves according to the laws of physics
about_the_game: Circus Elephant is a 3d platformer, where you play as an elephant in a circus. You need to control a ball that the elephant rides. The circus has a lot of obstacles that the elephant needs to pass, this elephant was captured from a forest by humans, and your main objective is to pass all obstacles to reach the end of each level, this game is a physics-based platformer momentum of the ball is crucial here. You can use a keyboard or controller to control the ball which moves according to the laws of physics
